name: refactor-project-structure
title: Refactor pyccode from monolith to modular structure
description: Restructure pyccode.py into organized modules while preserving all existing functionality and trellis workflow
creator: SutraHsing
notes: Goal: Clean structure, not over-engineered. Keep trellis workflow intact.

meta.reasoning: Single file (40KB) is becoming hard to maintain as features grow (4-layer context management, 7 tools, subagent system, skills, etc.). Need modular structure for future extensibility.
